title: Authors and Citation
text: Schoch D (2026). Rtumblr: Collecting Analyzing 'Tumblr' Data. R package version 0.2.0, https://github.com/schochastics/Rtumblr/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {Rtumblr: Collecting and Analyzing 'Tumblr' Data},   author = {David Schoch},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.2.0},   url = {https://github.com/schochastics/Rtumblr/}, }

title: Collecting and Analyzing Tumblr Data
text: Rtumblr wrapper official tumblr API. (existing CRAN package archived)

title: Collecting and Analyzing Tumblr Data
text: can install development version Rtumblr like :
code: devtools::install_github("schochastics/Rtumblr")

title: Collecting and Analyzing Tumblr Data
text: need register app : https://www.tumblr.com/oauth/apps , create environment variable called “RTUMBLR_TOKEN” (instance .Renviron) consumer_key consumer_secret follows. environment variable RTUMBLR_TOKEN 123456789;abcdefghi
code: consumer_key = 123456789 consumer_secret = abcdefghi

title: Collecting and Analyzing Tumblr Data
text: API endpoints work account. ones already implemented include: get_blog_blocks(): get list accounts blocked get_blog_likes(): get list posts liked get_blog_followers(): get followers get_blog_following(): get accounts follow Implemented endpoints work account : get_blog_avatar(): get avatar blog get_blog_info(): get general info blog get_blog_posts(): get posts blog get_posts_tag(): get posts specific tag. function return tibble (list tibble). get information columns, see official API documentation: https://www.tumblr.com/docs/en/api/v2

title: Retrieve Blogs Blocks — get_blog_blocks
text: Get blogs requested blog currently blocking. requesting user must admin blog retrieve list.  Note endpoint rate limited 60 requests per minute.

title: Retrieve Blogs Blocks — get_blog_blocks
code: get_blog_blocks(   blog,   limit = 20,   offset = 0,   n = limit,   app_credentials = NULL )

title: Retrieve Blogs Blocks — get_blog_blocks
text: blog name blog limit number blocks retrieve per request (1-20) offset block number start (default 0) n maximum number blocks retrieve across pages (default limit, .e. single page). Use Inf retrieve . app_credentials named list containing consumer key consumer secret. NULL, attempts load env variable

title: Retrieve Blogs Blocks — get_blog_blocks
text: tibble blocked blogs

title: Retrieve Blogs Blocks — get_blog_blocks
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # replace "your-blog-name" with your Tumblr username get_blog_blocks(blog = "your-blog-name") } # }

title: Retrieve Published Posts — get_blog_posts
text: function uses new post format (npf: https://www.tumblr.com/docs/npf). Pagination handled automatically: pages offset API cap 1000, continues via timestamp, n posts collected blog exhausted.

title: Retrieve Published Posts — get_blog_posts
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # replace "blog-name" with a Tumblr username get_blog_posts(blog = "blog-name") # retrieve all posts of a blog get_blog_posts(blog = "blog-name", n = Inf) } # }

title: Authenticate with Tumblr (OAuth 1.0a) — rtumblr_auth
text: Performs interactive three-legged OAuth 1.0a flow: opens browser can authorize app, exchanges verifier durable access token. access token cached disk (tools::R_user_dir()) browser opens ; subsequent sessions reuse cached token.

title: Authenticate with Tumblr (OAuth 1.0a) — rtumblr_auth
code: rtumblr_auth(app_credentials = NULL, cache = TRUE, force = FALSE)

title: Authenticate with Tumblr (OAuth 1.0a) — rtumblr_auth
text: app_credentials named list consumer_key consumer_secret. NULL, loaded RTUMBLR_TOKEN environment variable. cache logical, whether read/write access token -disk cache. force logical, TRUE re-run flow even cached token exists.

title: Authenticate with Tumblr (OAuth 1.0a) — rtumblr_auth
text: invisibly, list oauth_token oauth_token_secret.

title: Authenticate with Tumblr (OAuth 1.0a) — rtumblr_auth
text: normally need call directly: function hits OAuth-protected endpoint trigger automatically cached token found. , need provide app's consumer key secret via RTUMBLR_TOKEN environment variable ("consumer_key;consumer_secret").

title: Authenticate with Tumblr (OAuth 1.0a) — rtumblr_auth
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ rtumblr_auth() } # }

title: Rtumblr 0.2.0
text: HTTP backend migrated httr httr2. OAuth 1.0a signing interactive browser authentication flow now implemented -package; user-facing setup unchanged (set RTUMBLR_TOKEN="consumer_key;consumer_secret"). rtumblr_auth() exported (re-)run OAuth flow explicitly. access token now cached tools::R_user_dir("Rtumblr", "cache") instead .httr-oauth, asked authorize upgrading. Power users can supply pre-issued access token via four-field RTUMBLR_TOKEN ("consumer_key;consumer_secret;oauth_token;oauth_token_secret") skip browser. get_blog_posts() now paginates automatically. Pass n control many posts retrieve across pages (n = Inf fetches whole blog). n argument added get_blog_likes(), get_blog_following(), get_blog_followers() get_blog_blocks(). default limit get_blog_posts() (following/followers helpers) now 20, matching Tumblr API maximum (previous default 50 silently capped). Fixed bug get_blog_blocks(), get_blog_following() get_blog_followers() ignored offset argument. New read-endpoints: get_user_info(), get_user_limits(), get_dashboard(), get_user_likes(), get_user_following(), get_post() get_post_notes(). Tests now use httptest2 instead vcr.
